---
title: 'Connor''s Blog'
date: '2010-12-07T16:49:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Connor David Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '801036845090617544'
blogger_filename: '/2010/12/connors-blog.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Connor David Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
---

I'm reserving this url for you. You may want it some day.
